completed_tasks.name: Spotlight moved lower (55% Y) and dimmed — GT-style focal point
Garage door lines, rails, floor line all dimmed 30%
Top fade dissolves hard upper edge of door lines
Base gradient moved to full car item div — fixes GarageBg warm glow bleeding into model section
Floor ground line raised to 46% from bottom
Floor light pool: widened to 140%, brightened, 75% vertical, positioned at front of floor
Vignette overlay added to stage only (not info strip) — catalog/magazine focal point
Contact shadow replaced with CSS drop-shadow on img — alpha-traced, no rectangle artifacts
Carousel scrolls to chosen car on page load
Header shows chosen/active car name (getActiveCarId) not currently swiped car
Committed and pushed to main — live on gdimension.app

remaining_tasks.name: Pull manufacturer logos from GitHub repo (backgrounds already removed) into /public/manufacturer_logos/
remaining_tasks.notes: User has a GitHub repo with pre-removed-background car logos. Need URL from user. Logos must be named {make-lowercase}.png — already wired up in GarageCarsPage.tsx img src with onError hiding if missing.

human_actions_pending.action: Provide GitHub repo URL for manufacturer logos with removed backgrounds
human_actions_pending.context: Logos already wired in GarageCarsPage.tsx — /public/manufacturer_logos/{make-lowercase}.png. Just need to populate the folder.

decisions.decision: CSS drop-shadow on img instead of gradient blob for contact shadow
decisions.rationale: Reads PNG alpha channel, auto-traces car silhouette for any car at any angle. No rectangle artifacts, no manual tweaking.

decisions.decision: Vignette scoped to stage div only
decisions.rationale: Info strip (year/trim/mileage/buttons) must not be darkened — vignette is purely background framing

decisions.decision: Base gradient on car item div (not stage div)
decisions.rationale: Top bar had no background, GarageBg warm glow bled through — moving to car item covers full panel uniformly

decisions.decision: Header shows getActiveCarId car, not carousel scroll index
decisions.rationale: User wants header to reflect car they are 'in', static until they tap Choose

decisions.decision: Carousel opens at chosen car index on page load
decisions.rationale: User wants chosen car always first visible — scrolls via setTimeout after load
5 prior attempts all failed — alpha detection unreliable for arbitrary angles. User agreed.

next_action: Get GitHub repo URL for manufacturer logos from user. Download PNGs, rename to {make-lowercase}.png, copy to /public/manufacturer_logos/, commit and push.
context_notes: Garage carousel is complete and live. GT-style look: dark vignette edges, wide warm floor light pool, contact shadow via drop-shadow tracing car silhouette, door panel lines, beveled rails. All committed and pushed. Next session is the logo pull — quick task, just need the repo URL.
